title: PM Highlights Need for Responsible, Inclusive AI Adoption
description: Prime Minister Narendra Modi has stressed that responsible, inclusive adoption of artificial intelligence will be crucial to India’s goal of becoming a developed nation by 2047. Speaking at ICAI’s AI Innovation Summit, he highlighted how AI is transforming accounting and finance, boosting efficiency, compliance and innovation, and urged chartered accountants to lead ethical tech-driven change in the financial sector.
content:
Prime Minister Narendra Modi on Friday said responsible and inclusive adoption of artificial intelligence will play a vital role in accelerating India's journey to become a developed nation.

title: Customs Dept seizes 72 servers with AI chips worth RM53mil
description: SEPANG: A total of 72 servers containing advanced artificial intelligence (AI) chips worth nearly RM53mil were seized after the equipment was transited through the Kuala Lumpur International Airport (KLIA) Free Commercial Zone without the necessary permits.

title: Apple raises prices on Macs and iPads amid the AI boom
description: NEW YORK — Apple raised the prices of its Macs and iPads on Thursday, citing the soaring costs of memory and storage chips as the artificial intelligence (AI) boom has created a frenzy for the components.
